name: Accordion
description: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings that each contain a title representing a section of content. Users can expand or collapse associated content panels.

keyboard_interactions.action: Expands collapsed panel; may collapse other panels if only one can be expanded
Expands collapsed panel; may collapse other panels if only one can be expanded
Moves focus to next focusable element in page tab sequence
Moves focus to previous focusable element in page tab sequence
(Optional) Moves focus to next accordion header; wraps from last to first
(Optional) Moves focus to previous accordion header; wraps from first to last
(Optional) Moves focus to first accordion header
(Optional) Moves focus to last accordion header

roles.description: Applied to each accordion header title element
Wraps the button element with appropriate aria-level
Applied to the container for each panel's content

required_attributes.description: true when panel is visible; false when hidden
References the ID of the associated panel content element
Set to appropriate heading level in the document structure

optional_attributes.description: true when the panel is visible and cannot be collapsed
References the ID of the header button that controls the panel

notes: Prefer native <button> inside heading elements (<h2>, <h3>, etc.) over ARIA roles
The panel content should be hidden with display:none or hidden attribute when collapsed
